hero.name: Juan
hero.description: I build elegant, high-performance digital solutions, turning complex ideas into products people love to use.

about.title: Who am I
paragraphs: I'm a Brazilian software engineer specializing in backend and fullstack systems, with 4+ years of experience building scalable microservices and high-impact solutions in C# .NET and Golang. I've worked on international expansion projects, performance optimization, and fraud prevention.

I have experience with cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP), messaging, clean architecture (DDD), and agile practices. I enjoy solving complex problems and collaborating with global teams to deliver reliable and efficient software.

experience.title: Professional journey
experience.subtitle: Over 4 years building scalable, high-impact systems — from startups to international expansions at large companies.

highlights: Participated in building the vehicle rental contract system in Mexico, using React microfrontends and .NET microservices, supporting Localiza's expansion across Central and North America.
Developed a billing portal in .NET and Angular for Mexico, replacing a legacy system and reducing costs by $20k/month, processing over $150k/month in transactions.
Implemented an anti-fraud system with .NET and GraphQL integrated with Metamap, reducing fraud incidents by over 85% — from 50+ to fewer than 7 per month.
Integrated Mexican systems with GCP BigQuery, providing data to the data science team for strategic operational insights.
Developed a CRM for vehicle sales and transfers using C# .NET Core, DDD, and Clean Architecture, integrating RESTful APIs with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and AWS (S3, SQS), reducing response time by 30%+.
Optimized real-time vehicle auction through PostgreSQL query tuning with indexes, GraphQL, and Redis cluster, achieving ~65% response time reduction.
Mentored interns in C# .NET, accelerating onboarding and increasing team autonomy and productivity.
Built an e-commerce platform with Golang, GraphQL, Next.js, and Tailwind for a jewelry store, enabling the micro-entrepreneur to expand sales across the Northeast region of Brazil.
Led the development team and conducted agile ceremonies to maintain alignment, velocity, and delivery consistency.

projects.title: Featured work
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects that demonstrate my ability to solve real problems with elegant code.

items.title: Ensinai — EdTech Backend
items.description: Educational platform backend built with Go, Gin, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions. Clean architecture with strict linting (golangci) and full containerization.

items.title: E-commerce Microservices
items.description: Microservices architecture for e-commerce in .NET with independent catalog (MongoDB) and cart (Redis) services, orchestrated via Docker Compose. Clean Architecture pattern with domain separation.

items.title: Go Auth API
items.description: Authentication and authorization API in Go with Gin, JWT, refresh tokens, role/permission-based access control, MongoDB, Redis, and full Swagger documentation. Deployed with Docker Compose.

items.title: Ensinai — EdTech Mobile App
items.description: Educational platform mobile app built with React Native and Expo (TypeScript). iOS and Android support, new architecture enabled, integrated with Go backend, focused on mobile-first learning experience.

items.title: Auth Backend — C# .NET
items.description: Authentication API in .NET with Repository/Service architecture, JWT authentication, Entity Framework Core with migrations, and best practices for separation of concerns (Controllers, Models, Services).

items.title: Clean Architecture — .NET
items.description: Reference implementation in .NET using layered Clean Architecture, SOLID principles, and Domain-Driven Design (DDD). Structured study project to serve as a base for scalable enterprise applications.

contact.title: Let's work together?
contact.subtitle: I'm available for freelance, full-time projects, and collaborations. Send me a message — I'll reply within 24h.
